Time

Example Name Code

.125s

Time XS

This is XS time token.		 --ts-time-xs

.25s

Time S

This is S time token.		 --ts-time-s

.5s

Time M

This is M time token.		 --ts-time-m

1s

Time Default

This is Default time token.		 --ts-time

2s

Time L

This is L time token.		 --ts-time-l

5s

Time XL

This is XL time token.		 --ts-time-xl
